category_sources: source_facts.description describes a rebase alternative; official README and Read the Docs describe git-revise as a git subcommand for efficient commit updates, splits, and rearranges.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is git-revise; official GitHub repository and Read the Docs page use git-revise/git revise.
docs_sources: Official README states documentation is hosted on Read the Docs; Read the Docs contains install, manpage, performance, module, and contributing documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub source-control project URL; official Read the Docs page links back to the GitHub source.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions rebases and fixups; official documentation describes updating, splitting, and rearranging commits for patch-stack workflows.
